headlines.title: Burnham's 'Manchesterism' got him to No 10 - but will it work for the UK?

headlines.title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation

headlines.title: US launches new strikes as Iran says civilian infrastructure hit

headlines.title: Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election and questions voting security ahead of midterms
headlines.description: China said Trump's claims were fabricated and US Democrats said he was paving the way to undermine November's elections.

headlines.title: UK heatwave approaches two-week mark
headlines.description: All UK nations have experienced recent heatwave conditions but in southern England, the heatwave has now continued for 13 days. Sarah Keith-Lucas looks at how unusual this spell of heat is, and when we might see it easing.

headlines.title: Catfished student gets £10k after photos used for fake dating profiles

headlines.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
headlines.description: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.

headlines.title: Canada wildfires prompt US air quality alerts as smoke blankets major cities
headlines.description: Smoke from more than 800 blazes has filled major cities from Toronto and New York, to parts of the US Midwest and Great Lakes.
